MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-14-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANT WESTAR MARINE SERVICES' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/18/11 IS CONTINUED TO 8/15/11 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30AM PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. DISPOSITIVE MOTIONS DEADLINE REMAIN WITH THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE. THE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED BUT THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGED THE EXISTENCE OF THE DOCUMENTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Quash, Limit Or Modify Subpoenas Issued By Deft For Release Of Pltf'S Insurance Records
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DAVID BAYLY'S MOTION TO QUASH, LIMIT OR MODIFY SUBPOENAS ISSUED BY DEFENDANT WESTAR MARINE SERVICES FOR RELEASE OF PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE RECORDS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to Quash Subpoenas denied. Motion to limit or modify granted. Subpoenas modified as follows: Records to be produced in indicated claims.
1) That contain or reflect non-privileged statements by David Bayly related to facts surrounding those specific claims.
2) Non-privileged statements made about David Bayly or on his behalf related to those specific claims.
3) That contain or reflect injuries suffered by David Bayly similar to the injuries claimed in this current matter.
4) That contain or reflect any pre-existing injuries suffered by David Bayly prior to the claims designated with the aforementioned claim number that are similar to the injuries claimed in this matter.
5) Any settlement received by David Bayly;
6) Any settlement demand made by David Bayly. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Continued To Aug-15-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
